author: doll-agent
content: normal_array, uniform_array, exponential_array, poisson_array land on Generator<B> and use ferray-core's broadcast_shapes + broadcast_to so inputs are never materialized at the broadcast shape. 11 new tests cover broadcast derivation, per-element means, shape mismatch, and bad-param errors. cargo test -p ferray-random green; clippy -- -D warnings clean. Pattern established — extending the remaining distributions to take broadcast array params is now a mechanical follow-up.
